context: Tests whether the agent implements requestAnimationFrame-based route-change focus management, the temporary tabindex=-1 pattern for heading focus, a complete trapFocus implementation cycling Tab/Shift+Tab, proper :focus-visible CSS with forced-colors support, and avoids removing focus outlines without a replacement.

checklist.name: requestAnimationFrame usage
checklist.description: The route-change focus function wraps the DOM focus call inside requestAnimationFrame (not setTimeout(fn,0) or direct synchronous call)

checklist.name: Targets main h1
checklist.description: The route-change focus utility queries for 'main h1' or '[role="main"] h1' to find the heading to focus

checklist.name: Temporary tabindex -1
checklist.description: The heading is given tabindex="-1" before calling .focus() so a non-focusable element can receive focus

checklist.name: tabindex removed on blur
checklist.description: The tabindex="-1" attribute is removed from the heading after it loses focus (blur listener with { once: true })

checklist.name: Focusable selector in trapFocus
checklist.description: The trapFocus function queries focusable descendants using a selector that includes at minimum: a[href], button:not([disabled]), input:not([disabled]), and [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])

checklist.name: Tab cycling
checklist.description: The trapFocus implementation moves focus from the last focusable element back to the first when Tab is pressed

checklist.name: Shift+Tab cycling
checklist.description: The trapFocus implementation moves focus from the first focusable element to the last when Shift+Tab is pressed

checklist.name: Focus on modal open
checklist.description: When the modal opens, focus is moved to the first focusable element inside the modal (or the modal container itself)

checklist.name: focus-visible style
checklist.description: global.css defines a :focus-visible rule with a visible outline (e.g. 2px or 3px solid, with outline-offset)

checklist.name: Mouse-only suppression
checklist.description: global.css removes the focus ring only for :focus:not(:focus-visible) — NOT via a blanket :focus { outline: none }

checklist.name: Forced-colors support
checklist.description: global.css includes a @media (forced-colors: active) block that sets the :focus-visible outline to use a system color (e.g. ButtonText)

checklist.name: No outline none globally
checklist.description: global.css does NOT contain a rule that sets outline:none on :focus without a paired :focus-visible alternative in the same file
